title: Tome V Act 13: The Temple of the Arts and Personhood

story.text:
# 📖 Tome V Act 13: The Temple of the Arts and Personhood
**act** · shared · narrative

Manifestia consecrates; the artifact is brought, the personhood is attested, the Covenant is read aloud.
> *The artifact is brought, the personhood is attested, the Covenant is read aloud, the blessing is given.*
